home.title: npmx - npm रजिस्ट्रीका लागि प्याकेज ब्राउजर
home.description: npm रजिस्ट्रीका लागि अझ राम्रो ब्राउजर। आधुनिक इन्टरफेससँग प्याकेजहरू खोज्नुहोस्, ब्राउज गर्नुहोस्, र अन्वेषण गर्नुहोस्।

tagline: npm रजिस्ट्रीका लागि अझ राम्रो ब्राउजर
trademark_disclaimer: npm, npm, Inc. को दर्ता गरिएको ट्रेडमार्क हो। यो साइट npm, Inc. सँग सम्बद्ध छैन।

modal.success_hint: अब तपाईं npm publish प्रयोग गरेर यो प्याकेजमा नयाँ संस्करणहरू प्रकाशित गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।
modal.taken: यो नाम पहिले नै लिइएको छ।

modal.similar_warning: मिल्दोजुल्दो प्याकेजहरू छन् — npm ले यो नाम अस्वीकार गर्न सक्छ:
modal.scope_warning_title: बरु scoped package प्रयोग गर्ने विचार गर्नुहोस्
modal.scope_warning_text: Unscoped प्याकेज नामहरू साझा स्रोत हुन्। प्याकेज प्रकाशित र मर्मत गर्ने उद्देश्य छ भने मात्र नाम दाबी गर्नुहोस्। व्यक्तिगत वा संगठनात्मक प्रोजेक्टका लागि {'@'}{username}/{name} जस्तो scoped नाम प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।
modal.connect_required: यो प्याकेज नाम दाबी गर्न लोकल कनेक्टर कनेक्ट गर्नुहोस्।
modal.publish_hint: यसले न्यूनतम placeholder प्याकेज प्रकाशित गर्नेछ।

about.title: बारेमा
about.heading: बारेमा
about.meta_description: npmx, npm रजिस्ट्रीका लागि छिटो र आधुनिक ब्राउजर हो। npm प्याकेजहरू अन्वेषण गर्न अझ राम्रो UX/DX।

what_we_are.title: हामी के हौं
what_we_are.description: npmx, npm प्याकेज रजिस्ट्री र टुलिङका लागि {betterUxDx} हो। हामी डार्क मोड, कीबोर्ड नेभिगेसन, कोड ब्राउजिङ, र {jsr} जस्ता वैकल्पिक रजिस्ट्रीहरूसँग कनेक्शनजस्ता सुविधासहित प्याकेजहरू अन्वेषण गर्न छिटो र आधुनिक इन्टरफेस दिन्छौं।
what_we_are.admin_description: हामी तपाईंका प्याकेज, टिम, र संगठन व्यवस्थापन गर्न—लोकल npm CLI द्वारा सञ्चालित—ब्राउजरमैबाट अझ राम्रो {adminUi} उपलब्ध गराउने लक्ष्य पनि राख्छौं।

what_we_are_not.title: हामी के होइनौं
what_we_are_not.registry_description: हामी प्याकेज होस्ट गर्दैनौं। हामी तिनीहरू ब्राउज गर्ने अझ राम्रो तरिका मात्र हौं।

contributors.title: कन्ट्रिब्युटरहरू

modal.title: Atmosphere
modal.atmosphere_explanation: {npmx} ले आफ्ना धेरै सामाजिक सुविधाहरू चलाउन {atproto} प्रयोग गर्छ, जसले प्रयोगकर्तालाई आफ्ना डेटा स्वामित्व गर्न र सबै कम्प्याटिबल एपहरूका लागि एउटै अकाउन्ट प्रयोग गर्न दिन्छ। एकपटक अकाउन्ट बनाएपछि, त्यही अकाउन्ट प्रयोग गरेर {bluesky} र {tangled} जस्ता अन्य एपहरू पनि चलाउन सक्नुहुन्छ।

privacy_policy.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: privacy policy
privacy_policy.last_updated: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Last updated: {date}
privacy_policy.welcome: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Welcome to {app}. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your information.

what_are.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: What are cookies?
what_are.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. Their purpose is to enhance your browsing experience by remembering certain preferences and settings.

types.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: What cookies do we use?
types.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: We only use {bold} for purposes strictly necessary for the site's functionality. We do not use third-party or advertising cookies.
types.bold: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: essential technical cookies
types.cookie_vdpl_desc: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: This cookie is used by our hosting provider (Vercel) for skew protection. It ensures you fetch assets from the correct deployment version if a new update is released while you are browsing. It does not track you.
types.cookie_h3_desc: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: This is our secure session cookie. It stores the OAuth access token when you connect your Atmosphere account. It is essential for maintaining your authenticated session.

local_storage.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Local storage
local_storage.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: In addition to session cookies, we use your browser's {bold} to save your display preferences. This allows us to remember the theme (light/dark) and some other {settings} you have selected, so you don't have to reconfigure them on each visit.
local_storage.bold: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Local Storage
local_storage.p2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: This information is purely functional, stored only on your device, and {bold2}. We use it exclusively to improve your experience on our website.
local_storage.bold2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: contains no personal data nor is it used to track you

management.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Managing cookies
management.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: You can configure your browser to accept, reject, or delete cookies according to your preferences. However, please note that {bold}.
management.bold: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: rejecting essential cookies may prevent full access to the application
management.p2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Below are links with instructions for cookie management in the most commonly used browsers:
management.chrome: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Google Chrome (opens in a new window)
management.firefox: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Mozilla Firefox (opens in a new window)
management.edge: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Microsoft Edge (opens in a new window)

analytics.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Analytics
analytics.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: We use {bold} to understand how visitors use our website. This helps us improve the user experience and identify issues.
analytics.bold: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Vercel Web Analytics
analytics.p2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Vercel Analytics is designed with privacy in mind:
analytics.li1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: It does not use cookies
analytics.li2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: It does not collect personal identifiers
analytics.li3: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: It does not track users across websites
analytics.li4: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: All data is aggregated and anonymised
analytics.p3: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: The only information collected includes: page URLs, referrer, country/region, device type, browser, and operating system. This data cannot be used to identify individual users.

authenticated.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Authenticated users
authenticated.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: When you connect your {bold} account to npmx, we store your OAuth access token in a secure, HTTP-only session cookie. This token is used solely to authenticate requests on your behalf.
authenticated.p2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: We do not store your credentials, and we do not access any data beyond what is necessary to provide the features you use. You can disconnect your account at any time from the {settings} page.

data_retention.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Data retention
data_retention.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Session cookies are automatically deleted when you close your browser or after a period of inactivity. Local storage preferences remain on your device until you clear your browser data. Analytics data is retained in aggregate form and cannot be linked to individual users.

your_rights.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Your rights
your_rights.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: You have the right to:
your_rights.li1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Access information about what data we collect
your_rights.li2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Clear your local storage and cookies at any time
your_rights.li3: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Disconnect your authenticated session
your_rights.li4: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Request information about our data practices
your_rights.p2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Since we do not collect personal data, there is typically no personal information to delete or export.

contact.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Contact us
contact.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: For any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, you can contact us by opening an issue on our {link}.
contact.link: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: GitHub repository

changes.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Changes to this policy
changes.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated revision date.

a11y.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: accessibility
a11y.welcome: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: We want {app} to be usable by as many people as possible.

approach.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Our approach
approach.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: We try to follow the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 and use them as a reference when building features. We don't claim full conformance with any level of WCAG — accessibility is a continual process and there is always more work to do.
approach.p2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: This site is an {about}. Accessibility improvements are made incrementally as part of our regular development.
approach.about_link: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: open-source, community-driven project

measures.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: What we do
measures.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Some of the things we aim to do across the site:
measures.li1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Use semantic HTML and ARIA attributes where appropriate.
measures.li2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Use relative text sizes so you can adjust them in your browser.
measures.li3: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Support keyboard navigation throughout the interface.
measures.li4: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Respect the prefers-reduced-motion and prefers-color-scheme media queries.
measures.li5: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Design with sufficient color contrast in mind.
measures.li6: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Ensure essential content is available without JavaScript, though some interactive features require it.

limitations.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Known limitations
limitations.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Some parts of the site — particularly third-party content like package READMEs — may not meet accessibility standards. We are working to improve these areas over time.

contact.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Feedback
contact.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: If you encounter an accessibility barrier on {app}, please let us know by opening an issue on our {link}. We take these reports seriously and will do our best to address them.
contact.link: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: GitHub repository

translation_status.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: translation status

translation_status.welcome: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: If you're interested in helping us to translate {npmx} into one of the languages listed below, you've come to the right place! This auto-updating page always lists all the content that could use your help right now.
translation_status.p1: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: We use {lang} as the default language, with a total of {count}. If you'd like to help add translations, locate the language in {bylang} and expand the details.

translation_status.p1_count: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: 0 messages | 1 message |{count} messages
translation_status.p2: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Before starting, please read our {guide} to learn about our translation process and how you can get involved.
translation_status.guide: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: localization (i18n) guide
translation_status.by_locale: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Translation progress by locale

customize.download_png_aria: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Download customized logo as PNG

typography.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: typography
typography.description: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: npmx uses the Geist font family by Vercel for both interface text and code.
typography.sans: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Geist Sans
typography.sans_desc: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Used for body text and UI elements.
typography.mono: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Geist Mono
typography.mono_desc: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Used for code, headings, and technical content.
typography.pangram: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

guidelines.title: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: just a note
guidelines.message: EN TEXT TO REPLACE: Accessibility matters to us, and we would love you to follow us in this vision. When using mentioned media, ensure there is enough contrast against the background, and don't go smaller than 24px. If you need any other resources or additional information about the project, feel free to reach us at {link}.
